en-US.breathing_bracing: Exhale as you pull and inhale as you return.
common_mistakes: Leaning far back instead of pulling with control.
equipment_setup: Adjust the thigh pad so your legs stay down without discomfort.
movement_phases: Pull the bar toward the upper chest with controlled tempo.
Return the bar upward under control.

progressions.readiness_cue: Use this only after you can keep the shoulders controlled for every rep.
progressions.title: Slower return

en-US.purpose: Teach a controlled vertical pulling pattern with machine support.
regressions: Use a lighter pin setting and a shorter range you can control.
safety_notes: GymPrimer is educational content, not medical advice. Talk to a qualified professional before starting a new exercise program; stop and seek qualified help for sharp, radiating, worsening, or unusual symptoms.
en-US.start_position: Sit tall, hold the bar just wider than shoulder width, and keep your ribs stacked.
en-US.summary: A beginner pull exercise for learning how to train the upper back.
en-US.title: Lat pulldown
what_you_should_feel: Work through the sides of the upper back.
what_you_should_not_feel: Sharp, radiating, worsening, or unusual symptoms.
